title: Inbound Marketing Strategy Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Inbound Marketing Strategy skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

defined_buyer_personas.description: Defined buyer personas including role, industry, primary business problems, and information-seeking behavior

current_website_analytics.description: Current website analytics including organic traffic volume, traffic sources, top-performing content, and conversion rates by page type

existing_content_inventory.description: Existing content inventory with content type, topic, funnel stage alignment, and performance metrics

lead_volume_quality.description: Lead volume and quality data by acquisition channel showing where current inbound leads originate and how they convert through the sales funnel

keyword_research_data.description: Keyword research data showing organic search demand and competitive difficulty for topics relevant to the buyer's research journey

competitor_content_analysis.description: Competitor content analysis showing where competitors are generating organic visibility
